query:
SELECT 'payment_transactions' as src, section, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as total
FROM payment_transactions
GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'debt_collected_cache total_amount' as src, section, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as total
FROM debt_collected_cache
GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'debt_collected_cache payment_tx_amount' as src, section, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CAST(payment_tx_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as total
FROM debt_collected_cache
GROUP BY section
ORDER BY section, src;
